name: Rozan
description:
Appearance

Rozan looks like Godzilla. She has a spike on both of her elbows. Her tail has thagomizers. Her dorsal plates are curved down and pointier. Her body glows pink. Her chest and stomach areas are leaner and less heavy. She's more muscular than the average gojira. She can also speak telepathically
creator: Zeno_Hunter
